name: IUCN
description: Retrieve one IUCN Red List assessment by its assessment identifier through the current V4 conservation-data API.

auth.hint: Register for an IUCN Red List V4 token and send it as Authorization: Bearer <TOKEN>. Use is restricted by the Red List terms.

tools.name: get_assessment
tools.description: Retrieve a Red List assessment including taxon, category, publication, distribution, and conservation fields.

params.name: assessment_id
params.description: Numeric IUCN Red List assessment identifier.
